name: SettingsPage
description: A full settings screen with sections for profile, notifications, and preferences

visual.description: Full-width page with navigation sidebar on larger screens. Main content area shows settings sections in cards. Each section has a header and grouped controls. Uses subtle dividers between sections.
visual.layout: responsive sidebar + content area with stacked cards

props.name: sections
props.description: Which sections to show (profile, notifications, preferences, security)
